title: Guess the Soccer Player by Emoji ⚽ (Clues & Answers)
meta_description: Guess the soccer player by emoji — emoji clues with the player answers, ready to copy for quizzes, party games, and stories. Click any clue to copy it.
hero_h1: Guess the Soccer Player by Emoji
hero_tagline: Emoji clues with the player answers — copy a clue for a quiz, story, or group chat. Click any clue to copy it.
intro: “Guess the soccer player by emoji” is a favourite party and group-chat game: a few emojis hint at a star, and friends shout the name. Below, each emoji clue is paired with its answer so you can run the quiz or check yourself. Click a clue to copy the emojis, then share it and reveal the player.
